claim: True AI coding assistants must meet three attributes to be useful for value-creating engineers: working on existing codebases, having a file context mechanism to reference multiple files, and being iteratively controllable
actionable: When evaluating AI coding assistants, assess whether they can work on your existing codebase, allow you to reference multiple files in prompts, and support iteration to correct mistakes
source_title: AI Coding Assistants EXPOSED: Tackling 5 BIG Problems (and Solutions) of AI Copilots

claim: File management is the biggest problem blocking AI coding assistants from providing 5x productivity gains—manually adding every relevant file to prompts scales poorly with projects containing 5-20+ file imports
actionable: When using AI coding assistants, use open file context plugins (like the AER extension) that automatically track your working files instead of manually specifying references each time
source_title: AI Coding Assistants EXPOSED: Tackling 5 BIG Problems (and Solutions) of AI Copilots

claim: GPT-4 models in AI coding assistants produce errors roughly 1 in every 5 generations, combining limitations of both model capability and prompting technique
actionable: Plan for iterative refinement when using GPT-4 in coding assistants; expect to clarify or correct roughly 20% of outputs
source_title: AI Coding Assistants EXPOSED: Tackling 5 BIG Problems (and Solutions) of AI Copilots

claim: Speed is not a hard blocker for AI coding assistants, but GPT-4's latency compared to GPT-3.5 creates meaningful friction in the coding loop
actionable: For simple prompts or code generation, experiment with GPT-3.5 to maintain faster iteration cycles; reserve GPT-4 for complex reasoning tasks
source_title: AI Coding Assistants EXPOSED: Tackling 5 BIG Problems (and Solutions) of AI Copilots

claim: Skill atrophy is an overlooked cost of AI coding assistants—extended reliance reduces the mental reps of building, debugging, and understanding code complexity over months and years
actionable: Deliberately practice hands-on coding fundamentals alongside AI assistance; don't rely solely on prompting to avoid eroding your foundational engineering intuition
source_title: AI Coding Assistants EXPOSED: Tackling 5 BIG Problems (and Solutions) of AI Copilots

claim: The prompt is the new fundamental unit of programming—teams that don't study and master prompt engineering will fall behind in 2024 and beyond
actionable: Treat prompt engineering with the same rigor as data structures and algorithms; invest in learning effective prompting patterns for your coding domain
source_title: AI Coding Assistants EXPOSED: Tackling 5 BIG Problems (and Solutions) of AI Copilots

claim: Within 5 years, the ability to prompt code will become a baseline expectation for new hires, with prompt-based interview questions becoming standard during technical interviews
actionable: Start building your prompt engineering skills now to remain competitive in the job market; practice articulating complex requirements in natural language
source_title: AI Coding Assistants EXPOSED: Tackling 5 BIG Problems (and Solutions) of AI Copilots

claim: Cursor and Aider are currently the best two AI coding assistants as of January 2024, with Cursor being most threatened by GitHub Copilot improvements
actionable: Monitor GitHub Copilot's evolution closely if you're evaluating long-term investments in coding assistant tools
source_title: AI Coding Assistants EXPOSED: Tackling 5 BIG Problems (and Solutions) of AI Copilots
